title: pilosella × variifurca
intro: Pilosella × variifurca is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae), resulting from a hybridization between Pilosella officinarum and Pilosella eichleriana. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various digestive issues, such as dyspepsia and gastritis. The health benefits of Pilosella × variifurca include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe digestive issues and support immune function. Pilosella × variifurca is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
